MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT STREETROCKET.COM, INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Void Judgment: DENIED; Failure to comply with Labor Code 98.2(a). Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
